requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and NM Marking for Power Tools
requirement_topic.zh: 电动工具电气安全与NM标识
requirement_topic.zht: 電動工具電氣安全與NM標識

summary.en: Morocco places power tools through an IMANOR NM framework aligned to IEC and EN safety requirements for tool categories such as IEC 62841. The entry deliverable is an NM mark pathway that is handled in the Ministry of Industry import-conformity workflow via the local importer. Morocco uses 220 V, 50 Hz; the electrical frequency is aligned with China and the single-phase domestic nominal is similar for marketed tool configurations.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥通过IMANOR NM框架接纳电动工具，框架与IEC/EN安全要求（包括IEC 62841等）对齐。实际入场交付物是通过在摩进口商办理的工业部进口符合性流程中的NM标志路径。摩洛哥采用220 V、50 Hz，工作频率与中国一致，市场化型式一般使用单相供电。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥透過IMANOR NM框架接納電動工具，該框架與IEC/EN安全要求（包括IEC 62841等）對齊。實際入場交付物是通過在摩進口商辦理的工業部進口符合性流程中的NM標誌路徑。摩洛哥採用220V、50Hz，工作頻率與中國一致，市場化型式一般使用單相供電。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM safety framework for power tools aligning with IEC/EN references
Ministry of Industry import-conformity workflow and NM marking requirements

summary.en: Chinese electrical safety evidence is normally based on the GB/T 3883 series with CCC or other domestic obligations where applicable. Those Chinese results are useful for harmonised technical mapping but are not the Moroccan market deliverable by themselves.
summary.zh: 中国电气安全证据通常基于GB/T 3883系列，且在适用时有CCC等国内义务。该类中国结果可用于技术映射，但不能单独作为摩洛哥市场交付物。
summary.zht: 中國電氣安全證據通常基於GB/T 3883系列，且在適用時有CCC等國內義務。該類中國結果可用於技術映射，但不能單獨作為摩洛哥市場交付物。

gap.en: Most Chinese export packets stop at Chinese safety reporting and omit the Moroccan import-conformity filing structure. Exporters commonly need importer-led evidence packaging, NM scope confirmation, and documentation that aligns with in-country customs and marking processes.
gap.zh: 多数中国出口文件止步于中国侧安全报告，未覆盖摩洛哥进口符合性文件结构。常见差距是缺少由进口商牵头的文件包、NM适用范围确认，以及与本地海关和标识流程一致的资料。
gap.zht: 大多數中國出口文件止步於中國側安全報告，未覆蓋摩洛哥進口符合性文件結構。常見差距是缺少由進口商牽頭的文件包、NM適用範圍確認，以及與本地海關和標識流程一致的資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated power tools. Market placement requires the Ministry of Industry import-conformity pathway and NM marking flow managed by the in-country importer.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where Chinese domestic categories impose GB/T 3883 obligations and CCC where applicable.

source.publisher: Morocco Ministry of Industry and Trade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Morocco-ready until safety evidence is mapped into the import-conformity file through the in-country importer, and NM marking steps are completed as part of the same market-entry workflow.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在未通过在摩进口商将安全证据纳入进口符合性文件并完成NM标识环节前，不应视为摩洛哥就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在未透過在摩進口商將安全證據納入進口符合性文件並完成NM標識環節前，不應視為摩洛哥就緒。
